data.project_goal: Build an AI-powered internal customer support platform for employees
requirements_needed: Integrate with existing Azure AD authentication
Support scalable architecture for future growth
Ensure GDPR compliance for European operations

cloud_provider.description: Azure (preferred), open to alternatives for cost savings

preferences: Cost-effective alternatives without major compatibility issues
open_questions: Should we use Azure OpenAI, self-hosted models, or another provider?
What developer hardware is recommended for local AI feature development?
data.summary: Develop an AI-driven customer support platform using Azure ecosystem with GDPR compliance, while evaluating optimal AI model solutions and developer hardware requirements
